title: Scootsy Holdings Services is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Scootsy Holdings Services is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Scootsy Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Scootsy Holdings Services:
Scootsy Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy Holdings Services!
